//: Lighthouse CI config — quality gate for DeutschSphere. Accessibility, best-practices, and SEO are hard gates (must stay at the bars we verified on 2026-06-30: a11y 100, best-practices 100, seo 100). Performance is advisory only: CI runs under simulated-mobile throttling on unminified dev assets, so its score is not representative of the GitHub Pages production build — it is tracked as a warning, not a blocker.
